_comment: Template — copy to autviam_c_config.json and fill values. Schema version 2-codex.
_nested_dispatch_comment: off | on | auto — see commands/E2E.md § Nested-Dispatch capability. Default off = inline phase loop; on/auto require routed custom-profile nesting.
_project_help: 'disable' (default) = no GitHub Project sync. Otherwise a board: "Project Name" (owner defaults to repo owner), or {"owner":"X","name":"..."} / {"owner":"X","number":N}.
